lesson.menu_desc: Telling the story of your professional path -- 29 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Your Career Journey -- Telling the Story of How You Got Here
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Marcos Mansour | Aula 2 -- Your Career Journey

listenings.text: Hello, everyone. Let me tell you a little about myself and how I got here. I studied economics at a university in Toronto, and I graduated in 2006. After university, a large bank hired me as a financial analyst. I worked there for several years and gained a lot of experience in finance. Then, about ten years ago, I moved into valuation, because I wanted more contact with real projects and clients. In 2018, my firm promoted me to senior partner. Winning my first international client was a real milestone in my career. Step by step, I built the path that brought me to this congress today. Thank you for listening, and I look forward to meeting you.
